prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年理科/物理类最低位次约9131→9090→11821→23681→24529。2021-2022年基本持平在9100名左右，2023年小幅后移至11821名。2024年安徽省实施新高考 后，因选科要求分组，再选不限组（W004）位次大幅后移至23681名，2025年继续后移至24529名，近两年累计后移约848名。2025年基准位次约24529名；该校在 安徽省物理类招生计划2021-2023年均为101人，2024年增至103人，2025年增至106人，2026年计划113人，较2025年扩招7人（约6.6%），扩招幅度明显，对竞争有一定缓解 作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华北电力大学（北京）为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第84名，近年排名在75-84之间波动，整体稳定；该校 近年声誉平稳，未被收录于学校声誉舆情文件，无明显负面舆情事件；抖音热度排名未进入前106名，短视频平台关注度一般；无投档线异常断档记录；电气工 程为A级学科（全国顶尖），动力工程及工程热物理为A-级学科，均为能源电力领域核心学科，与该校电气类、能源动力类等招生专业高度对应，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校位于北京市，属于一线城市高校，对安徽省考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在安徽省物理类招生计划约100余人，属跨省招生，地域偏好因素影响有限；电气工程及其自动化、能源动力类专业社会热度持续升温（2024年电气工程及其自动化被评为高热推荐，能源动力类被评为推荐），相关专业报考竞争可 能加剧；安徽省2026年高考总报名人数约45.1万，较2025年略有下降，物理类考生估算约31.4万，较2025年32.1万减少约7000人，竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次在新高考后持续后移趋势、2026年计划扩招约6.6%缓解竞争、物理类考生总数略有减少、电气能源类专业热度升温吸引高分考生等多重因素，在2025年 基准24529名基础上预计位次继续后移；预测最低位次约25551名，区间25051-26051名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 9131 → 9090 → 11821 → 23681 → 24529. It remained stable around 9100 in 2021-2022, slightly shifted to 11821 in 2023. In 2024, Anhui implemented the new college entrance exam, causing the ranking of the unrestricted group (W004) to significantly drop to 23681 due to subject selection grouping, and further to 24529 in 2025, with a cumulative shift of about 848 over the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 24529. The enrollment plan for physics category in Anhui was 101 from 2021 to 2023, increased to 103 in 2024, 106 in 2025, and planned 113 in 2026, an expansion of 7 (about 6.6%) compared to 2025, which significantly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: North China Electric Power University (Beijing) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities is approximately 84th in 2026, fluctuating between 75 and 84 in recent years, overall stable. Its reputation has been steady recently, not included in the university reputation sentiment file, with no significant negative incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranking is not in the top 106, indicating average attention on short video platforms. There are no records of abnormal cutoff score drops. Electrical Engineering is an A-level discipline (top nationally), and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics is an A- level discipline, both core fields in energy and power, closely matching the university's enrollment majors like Electrical and Energy Power, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Located in Beijing, a first-tier city, the university has strong regional appeal to Anhui candidates. Its enrollment plan in Anhui for physics category is about 100+, a cross-provincial enrollment, so location preference has limited impact. Majors like Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Energy and Power Engineering are increasingly popular (in 2024, Electrical Engineering and Automation was rated as high-heat recommended, Energy and Power as recommended), potentially intensifying competition for related majors. The total number of Anhui college entrance exam takers in 2026 is about 451,000, slightly down from 2025, with physics category candidates estimated at 314,000, a decrease of about 7,000 from 2025's 321,000, slightly easing competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous downward trend in historical rankings after the new college entrance exam, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 6.6% easing competition, a slight decrease in total physics candidates, and the rising popularity of electrical and energy majors attracting high-scoring students, the ranking is expected to continue shifting downward from the 2025 baseline of 24529. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 25551, with a range of 25051-26051.

Electrical Engineering and Automation (A-level discipline) is the university's flagship major; if your ranking is significantly above the upper limit, you can prioritize it. Energy and Power Engineering (A- level discipline) offers good employment prospects and high cost-effectiveness.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 2177 → 2959 → 2644 → 3129 → 3309. Overall, there is a fluctuating backward trend, with a shift of about 782 places from 2021 to 2022, a slight recovery to 2644 in 2023, a continued backward shift to 3129 after the new college entrance examination in 2024, and a further shift to 3309 in 2025, with a cumulative shift of about 665 places in the past three years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 3309; the university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Anhui Province was 11 students from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 9 in 2024, 8 in 2025, and planned 7 in 2026, a reduction of 1 student (about 12.5%) compared to 2025, with three consecutive years of enrollment reduction, leading to intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: North China Electric Power University (Beijing) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University Ranking is approximately 84th in 2026, with stable rankings in recent years; the university's reputation has been stable recently, with no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin popularity is average; no abnormal gaps in admission scores have been recorded; Electrical Engineering (A) and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics (A-) are its core advantageous disciplines, but liberal arts majors (Law, English, Public Administration, etc.) have low correlation with these advantageous disciplines, and the disciplinary advantages have limited pull effect on liberal arts admissions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: The university is located in Beijing, which has some regional appeal for liberal arts candidates in Anhui Province, but the liberal arts enrollment plan is very small (only 7-8 students), so the regional preference impact is limited; social popularity of liberal arts majors is polarized: Law is in a wait-and-see state of differentiation (fierce competition but obvious advantages for civil service exams), Foreign Languages is generally wait-and-see, and Public Management popularity is stable; the estimated number of history category candidates in Anhui Province in 2026 is about 137,000, slightly decreasing from 141,000 in 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the planned enrollment reduction of about 12.5% in 2026 intensifying competition, and the slight decrease in history category candidates partially offsetting the enrollment reduction, based on the 2025 baseline of 3309, the ranking is expected to move slightly forward (competition intensifies, making it harder to enter); the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3031, with a range of 2531-3531.
